checks.firstScreenValue: source notice, action cards, review state, and selected evidence are visible on one screen
checks.userControlledInteraction: filter buttons, card selection, and ready/follow-up buttons are implemented with local state
checks.stateChange: visible card list, selected evidence, and review counters change from user input
checks.inspectableOutput: README, metadata, manifest, source page, static sample data, and validation files are present

notes: Generated by materialize-llm-plan and manually completed as a static local-state artifact. It still requires reviewer and publisher re-run before feed publication.
